basics.name: Roman Pinchuk
basics.label: Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: High-level self-learning skills. Team player, able to cooperate and collaborate with coworkers in various departments to complete projects promptly. Complex problem-solving skills allow me to quickly find solutions to arising issues. I was on both sides of the development. Since I have two educations, I understand perfectly well the connection between business processes and their implementation. And yes, I can read and understand a documentation and manuals.

work.summary: This project was a module for a large company. I builded a customer support system. Some questions were solved in a chat room with the help of a bot, as well as the possibility to contact a real person.
highlights: I developed a support customer system based on Quasar and Zammad
GitLab CI/CD was applied throughout the project (used YAML)
Communicate with UI/UX designer, pm, DevOps, backend member and develop new product

work.company: Compulsory Medical Insurance Fund of Russia
work.summary: I was involved in supporting and developing the existing information system for planned hospitalization in St. Petersburg. In the project I used PostgreSQL, jQuery, Camunda BPMN. Initially I came to the position of System Analyst, but soon I moved to the development department as I saw a lot of defects.
highlights: Created automation tests by using Selenium and Python
Ensuring the performance and fault tolerance of the information system with more than 7,500 users
Created DBMS PostgreSQL from open-source kernel

work.company: State Unitary Enterprise “St. Petersburg Information and Analytical Center”
work.summary: I was in the analytics department as a systems analyst. My task was to analyze existing business processes and prepare interface prototypes.
highlights: Prototyped UI/UX for existing and future features using best practices and guidelines by Apple and Google
Implemented his development of the transfer of old public services to a new portal of public services in St.-Petersburg
Wrote and prepared technical documentation for the IDEF0 development department in the UML notation

education.institution: Technical College of Management and Commerce, RU
education.area: Software of Computing and Automation Systems

awards.title: Top 5
awards.summary: KEEPSTANCE is a project in which I was involved as a Full Stack developer. It is a cross-platform application and SDK to determine the distance between devices based on BLE and iBeacon.
